## Package 1 — @exxat-ds/ui (Admin DS)

**Source:** `exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/` (git submodule — READ ONLY)
**Remote:** https://github.com/ExxatDesign/Exxat-DS-Workspace.git

### All Exports (confirmed from exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/index.ts)

```ts
// UI Components (each exports multiple named exports — see individual files)
export * from "./components/ui/avatar"
export * from "./components/ui/badge"
export * from "./components/ui/banner"
export * from "./components/ui/breadcrumb"
export * from "./components/ui/button"
export * from "./components/ui/calendar"
export * from "./components/ui/card"
export * from "./components/ui/chart"
export * from "./components/ui/checkbox"
export * from "./components/ui/coach-mark"
export * from "./components/ui/collapsible"
export * from "./components/ui/command"
export * from "./components/ui/date-picker-field"
export * from "./components/ui/dialog"
export * from "./components/ui/drag-handle-grip"
export * from "./components/ui/drawer"
export * from "./components/ui/dropdown-menu"
export * from "./components/ui/field"
export * from "./components/ui/form"
export * from "./components/ui/input-group"
export * from "./components/ui/input"
export * from "./components/ui/kbd"
export * from "./components/ui/label"
export * from "./components/ui/popover"
export * from "./components/ui/radio-group"
export * from "./components/ui/select"
export * from "./components/ui/selection-tile-grid"
export * from "./components/ui/separator"
export * from "./components/ui/sheet"
export * from "./components/ui/sidebar"
export * from "./components/ui/skeleton"
export * from "./components/ui/sonner"
export * from "./components/ui/table"
export * from "./components/ui/tabs"
export * from "./components/ui/textarea"
export * from "./components/ui/tip"
export * from "./components/ui/toggle-group"
export * from "./components/ui/toggle-switch"
export * from "./components/ui/toggle"
export * from "./components/ui/tooltip"
export * from "./components/ui/view-segmented-control"

// Hooks
export * from "./hooks/use-app-theme"    // useAppTheme, Brand, ContrastPreference, ContrastMode
export * from "./hooks/use-coach-mark"   // useCoachMark
export * from "./hooks/use-mobile"       // useMobile
export * from "./hooks/use-mod-key-label" // useModKeyLabel

// Utilities
export * from "./lib/utils"        // cn() and other helpers
export * from "./lib/date-filter"  // date filtering utilities
```

### Import Examples (from admin apps)

```ts
// In any admin .tsx component:
import {
  Button,
  Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarHeader, SidebarFooter,
  SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarGroup,
  SidebarGroupContent, SidebarGroupLabel, SidebarSeparator,
  useSidebar,
  Avatar, AvatarFallback,
  Badge,
  DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuTrigger,
  Sheet, SheetContent, SheetHeader,
  Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader,
  Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger,
  TooltipProvider, Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger,
  Kbd, KbdGroup,
  useAppTheme, useModKeyLabel, useMobile,
} from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
```

```css
/* In app/globals.css of each admin app: */
@import '../../../../exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/theme.css';
@import "tailwindcss";
@source '../../../../exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}';
```

### CSS Files
- `theme.css` — CSS custom properties only. Import this in product apps.
- `globals.css` — Full DS CSS including Tailwind. DO NOT import in product apps. Used internally by the DS storybook.

### Package.json Exports (for reference)
```json
{
  ".": { "types": "./src/index.ts", "default": "./src/index.ts" },
  "./globals.css": "./src/globals.css",
  "./theme.css": "./src/theme.css",
  "./components/*": "./src/components/ui/*",
  "./hooks/*": "./src/hooks/*",
  "./lib/*": "./src/lib/*"
}
```

### Key Types (confirmed from hooks/use-app-theme.ts)
```ts
type Brand = "one" | "prism"
// "one"   → .theme-one / .theme-lavender CSS class (hue 286.1)
// "prism" → .theme-prism / .theme-rose CSS class (hue 342-343)

type ContrastPreference = "system" | "normal" | "high"
type ContrastMode = "normal" | "high"
```

### Theme System — CSS Classes (NO themes.ts or applyTheme() exists)
```css
/* Apply to <html> element */
.theme-one      /* Exxat One · Lavender · hue 286.1 — default */
.theme-lavender /* alias for .theme-one */
.theme-prism    /* Exxat Prism · Rose · hue 342 */
.theme-rose     /* alias for .theme-prism */
.dark           /* dark mode — combine with theme class */

/* Example: <html class="theme-one dark"> */
```

## Package 2 — Student DS (studentUX)

**Source:** `studentUX/src/` (git submodule — READ ONLY)
**Note:** This is NOT a published npm package. It's a Vite/React project consumed via
webpack alias `@exxat/student` → `studentUX/src/`.

### UI Primitives — exact file names (import individually)

Each file in `studentUX/src/components/ui/`:
```
accordion.tsx          alert-dialog.tsx       alert.tsx
aspect-ratio.tsx       avatar.tsx             badge.tsx
breadcrumb.tsx         button-group.tsx       button.tsx
calendar.tsx           card.tsx               carousel.tsx
chart.tsx              checkbox.tsx           collapsible.tsx
command.tsx            context-menu.tsx       dialog.tsx
drawer.tsx             dropdown-menu.tsx      empty.tsx
error-boundary.tsx     field.tsx              form.tsx
hover-card.tsx         input-group.tsx        input-otp.tsx
input.tsx              kbd.tsx                label.tsx
menubar.tsx            navigation-menu.tsx    outline-search-input.tsx
pagination.tsx         popover.tsx            progress.tsx
radio-group.tsx        resizable.tsx          scroll-area.tsx
searchable-select.tsx  select.tsx             separator.tsx
sheet.tsx              sidebar.tsx            skeleton.tsx
slider.tsx             sonner.tsx             switch.tsx
table.tsx              tabs.tsx               textarea.tsx
toggle-group.tsx       toggle.tsx             tooltip.tsx
use-mobile.ts                                utils.ts
```

### Shared Components — exact exports (confirmed from shared/index.ts)

```ts
// Cards
import { ActionCard, createActionCardData } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { ActionCardData, ActionCardProps } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { SectionCard } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { SectionCardProps } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { InsightCard, createInsightCardData } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { InsightCardData, InsightCardProps, InsightCardVariant } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { MetricCard, createMetricCardData } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { MetricCardData, MetricCardProps } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { InternshipCard } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { PartnerSitePerformanceCard } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import { PendingApprovalChartCard } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { KeyMetricsShowcase } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import { SectionWithHeader } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { SectionWithHeaderVariant } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { AlertsSection } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { AlertItem } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { MapSection, AddressMap } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { MapLocation, MapAlert, SearchFieldConfig } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { ScheduleBanners } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { ScheduleBannerType } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { SimpleMetric, createSimpleMetricData } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { SimpleMetricVariant } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

// Table Infrastructure
import { DataTable, autoSuggestColumnPinning } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { ColumnConfig, DataTableProps, FreezeDirection, SortDirection, SortConfig, GroupConfig } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { Pagination } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { PaginationInfo } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { TableProperties } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { TableDisplayConfig } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import {
  FilterClauseEditor, FilterClause, FilterClauseConnector,
  ScrollableContainer, ScrollableOptionList, FILTER_LAYOUT,
} from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { ViewManager } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { ViewSettings } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import FilterBar, { FILTER_SEARCH_THRESHOLD } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { FilterConfig, ActiveFilter } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { FloatingActionBar, BulkActionBar, defaultBulkActions, slotsBulkActions, getPipelineActionsForStage } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { BulkAction } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

// Page Templates
import { PrimaryPageTemplate } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { ViewConfig, PrimaryPageMetricsConfig, PrimaryPageFilterConfig, PrimaryPageTablePropertiesConfig, PrimaryPageBulkAction, PrimaryPageTemplateProps } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { ReportPageTemplate } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { ReportPageViewConfig, ReportPageTemplateProps } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { WelcomePageTemplate } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import type { WelcomePageTemplateProps, WelcomePageBackgroundVariant, WelcomePageHeaderVariant } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

import { BuildProfilePageTemplate } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import { ProfileEditDialog } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
import { JobSearchBar } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

// Visualizations
import { ChartAreaInteractive, CalendarView, PipelineStepper } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

// Leo AI
import { AskLeoButton } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'
```

### Import Path Pattern
```ts
// UI primitives — one file per component
import { Button } from '@exxat/student/components/ui/button'
import { Badge, badgeVariants } from '@exxat/student/components/ui/badge'
import { Input } from '@exxat/student/components/ui/input'
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from '@exxat/student/components/ui/avatar'
import {
  Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarHeader, SidebarFooter,
  SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton,
} from '@exxat/student/components/ui/sidebar'

// Shared composite components — single import
import { DataTable, FilterBar, PrimaryPageTemplate } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'

// Hooks and utils
import { useMobile } from '@exxat/student/components/ui/use-mobile'
import { cn } from '@exxat/student/components/ui/utils'
```

```css
/* In app/globals.css of student apps: */
@import "tailwindcss";
@import '../../../../studentUX/src/styles/globals.css';
@source '../../../../studentUX/src/components/**/*.{ts,tsx}';
```

---

## When DS Updates

### Update Admin DS (exxat-ds submodule)
```bash
# From monorepo root: /Users/romitsoley/Work/
git submodule update --remote --merge
# Then review any new exports by re-reading exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/index.ts
```

### Update Student DS (studentUX submodule)
```bash
# From monorepo root: /Users/romitsoley/Work/
git submodule update --remote --merge
# Then review any new exports in studentUX/src/components/shared/index.ts
# and any new files in studentUX/src/components/ui/
```

### After either update
- Re-read the relevant index files to update component lists
- Update apps/[product]/CLAUDE.md Section 3 and 4 for any new or removed exports
- Run `pnpm build` to catch any broken imports
